{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154043787B217FA5BB83A6637B"}"},"total":9279},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7098860155453997832","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这故事人物写的很有质感。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1652832283,"group_id":"7088116123270384672","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxuCYEk7gyQT1ANHm5iYXaY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"110989985797","user_name":"喜欢树头菜的萧无机"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110989985797","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7088116123270384672","book_info":{"abstract":"叶枫穿越到玄天大陆，激活无敌败家系统，开始了无敌败家之路。
   星魂宗宗主洛芊雪：“我乃上界圣女，遭人暗算重生在下界玄天大陆，我只想安静修炼，尽快渡劫重返上界，叶枫，你能不能别败家了，我根本不想发展宗门啊，你是上天派来折磨我的吧！”
   失传的九品破劫丹拿去喂狗，蕴含无情剑道的画拿去烧火，无上功法拿去当厕纸……
   宗门一众大佬疯了：“宗主，叶枫太败家了，求求你管管他吧！”
   稀有灵草、珍贵灵矿、无上功法、无限灵石……
   “你们做梦都想得到的宝贝，我这全部都有，给不给你们得看我心情，我就是败家，就是玩！”
   看着洛芊雪渡劫成功，叶枫心中默念：“系统，消耗败家点，直接提升到渡劫境第九重，我要渡劫跟随师尊前往上界继续败家！”
   “渡劫成功，终于摆脱叶枫这个败家子了！”
   就在洛芊雪松了口气，认为摆脱了叶枫的时候，雷劫再现，忍不住惊呼道：“叶枫，给为师留条活路吧，飞升了你都不放过我！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b18197c1b181ce52414e997ac5c94b1d","author":"战天痕","author_id":"","book_id":"7088116123270384672","book_name":"上交亿倍灵石入宗，吓坏女帝师尊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7088123063149003267","read_count":"59279","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2204602"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"1063","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,重生,穿越,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d8ed59e9f414b1cb7ede8c12801c0fe8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435643&x-signature=d%2BtuFOuMJoPh9zKyuglUjrj61y8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"83229702739","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.3140225e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154043787B217FA5BB83A6637B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_
